site.name: W2A Protocol
site.description: The open standard that makes any website agent-readable. Spec, validator, and tooling for the Web2Agent Protocol.

capabilities.intent: retrieve the full W2A protocol specification for a given version
capabilities.description: Returns the full spec document. Omit version to get the latest. e.g. GET /spec/v0.1

capabilities.intent: validate an agents.json manifest against the W2A spec and return any errors
capabilities.description: Validates a W2A manifest object. Returns structured errors with field paths and fix suggestions.

capabilities.intent: generate a W2A agents.json manifest from a website URL by analysing its existing signals
capabilities.description: Crawls the target URL and reads Schema.org JSON-LD, Open Graph, sitemap, and HTML forms to produce a draft manifest. Returns confidence score 0-1.

capabilities.intent: retrieve example agents.json manifests for common site types
capabilities.description: Returns example manifests. Filter by type: ecommerce, blog, saas, marketplace, media, api. Omit for all.

capabilities.intent: retrieve the JSON Schema definition for validating W2A manifests programmatically
capabilities.description: Returns the JSON Schema (Draft 7) for the W2A manifest format. Use this to validate manifests in your own tooling.

capabilities.intent: check whether a website already serves a valid W2A manifest
capabilities.description: Fetches /.well-known/agents.json from the target domain and reports whether it exists and is valid.

a2a_profile.name: W2A Protocol
a2a_profile.description: Official agent interface for the W2A Protocol — spec retrieval, manifest validation, and site checking.
